_comment: Approved free/OSS MCP source-of-truth policy. INJECTED as guidance and reported in artifacts — NOT runtime-enforced (a script cannot force a tool call). Availability is detected at runtime; unavailable MCPs are reported, never faked.

approved.name: GitHub
approved.use: repo, PRs, issues, commits, CI context

securityDefaults: filesystem scoped to the current project
no destructive commands without explicit approval
never install untrusted MCP servers globally
